title: Tweakami
description: This datapack aims to make your minecraft Vanilla experience more convenient! No more wasted materials!
body:
![tweakami logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe3816f421c1bcd137118cce5bd5964675d75f5a.png)

This datapack aims to make your minecraft Vanilla/Modded experience more convenient!

To make it simple! A lot of things are cheaper now in the long run! Or now obtainable to craft! All while making sure Minecraft keeps its flow and still feels fair.


Stairs and Trapdoors result in 6 when crafted now
Wool can be crafted to string
Slabs can be combined for their block counterpart
You can throw magma cream into a cauldron to clean it!
Mooshrooms now drop mushrooms
Shulkers can drop up to 2 shells
Mushrooms can be made into Mushroom Blocks now!
Melons, Amethysts, Clay, Quartz, Bricks, and Honeycomb can all be condensed and reversed now!
Spectral Arrows can now be crafted
Rotten Flesh can be smelted for Leather!
Rabbit Hide can be used for bundles!
And Much more! Discover it all in-game!
